title: How GLP-1 Medications Change Your Gut Microbiome After 40: What to Know
author: Happy Aging Team
meta_description: GLP-1 medications like semaglutide change your gut microbiome by slowing gastric emptying. Learn how women over 40 can support gut health during GLP-1 treatment.
